2605.19805.title: Latent Laplace Diffusion for Irregular Multivariate Time Series
2605.19805.paper_summary: Irregular multivariate time series impose a trade-off for long-horizon forecasting: discrete methods can distort temporal structure via re-gridding, while continuous-time models often require sequential solvers prone to drift. To bridge this gap, we present Latent Laplace Diffusion (LLapDiff), a generative framework that models the target as a low-dimensional latent trajectory, enabling horizon-wide generation without step-by-step integration over physical time. We guide the reverse process utilizing a stable modal parameterization motivated by stochastic port-Hamiltonian dynamics, and parameterize its mean evolution in the Laplace domain via learnable complex-conjugate poles, enabling direct evaluation over irregular timestamps. We also link continuous dynamics to irregular observations through renewal-averaging analysis, which maps sampling gaps to effective event-domain poles and motivates a gap-aware history summarizer. Extensive experiments show that LLapDiff improves over baselines in long-horizon forecasting, and its continuous-time generative nature supports missing-value imputation by querying the same model at historical timestamps. Code is available at https://github.com/pixelhero98/LLapDiffusion.
2605.19805.paper_summary_zh: 不規則的多變量時間序列在長期預測中帶來了權衡：離散方法可能通過重新網格化扭曲時間結構，而連續時間模型通常需要易於漂移的序列求解器。為了彌補這一差距，我們提出了潛在拉普拉斯擴散（LLapDiff），這是一個生成框架，將目標建模為低維潛在軌跡，實現了無需逐步在物理時間上進行積分的全範圍生成。我們利用穩定的模態參數化來指導反向過程，這一參數化受到隨機端哈密頓動力學的啟發，並通過可學習的複共軛極點在拉普拉斯域中參數化其均值演變，從而實現對不規則時間戳的直接評估。我們還通過更新平均分析將連續動力學與不規則觀測聯繫起來，這將取樣間隙映射到有效事件域極點，並促進了基於間隙的歷史摘要器。大量實驗表明，LLapDiff在長期預測中優於基準，其連續時間生成特性通過在歷史時間戳查詢相同模型來支持缺失值插補。代碼可在 https://github.com/pixelhero98/LLapDiffusion 獲得。
2605.19805.author: Zinuo You et.al.
2605.19805.authors: Zinuo You, Jin Zheng, John Cartlidge
